snippet.title: SEI HE KI REIKI  Healing SYMBOL drawing for EMOTIONAL BALANCE & HARMONY, Positivevibes,BeBlessed
snippet.description:
Sei He Ki is the second symbol at level 2 in the Reiki system.
 
With a slightly higher vibration than Cho Ku Rei, Sei He Ki helps open dimensions, create harmony, and provide emotional healing. 
 
Sei He Ki works great with cho ku rei because they complement each other while enhancing the power of self-treatment.

This traditional reiki symbol Sei He Ki represents mental-emotional healing, harmony, and balance.

It can empower affirmations, help you overcome mental obstacles and addictions. it
works in the subconscious mind hence repeating the name of this symbol mentally can help in empowerment of your affirmations and help you accomplish your goal. If you write down affirmations you can draw the symbol on the paper as well.

To cleanse negative self-induced patterns, and unhealthy mental conditioning it can be used
is to increase the mental energy field surrounding the third eye Chakra.
Activate Sei He Ki in your palms and place one on your forehead and one on the backside of your head Stay in this position for about 10 minutes each day and then notice how the energy field generated by this chakra starts to cleanse itself & expand.

During self-treatment introduce positive affirmations such as-
"I am doing ..."
 "I am good at "…”, or 
"I am thankful for having ...(your future desire) always bring in the present what you would like to manifest in the future and 
be happy and grateful that you are in the process of achieving your goals.

Some Reiki practitioners characterize Sei He Ki as a symbolic representation of the brain hemisphere .It will bring balance to the two hemispheres and peace is achieved in life when the two sides work together in balance and harmony
while others see it as depicting the human face.

This symbol helps heal headaches caused primarily due to emotional or mental stress & improve
 memory.

Healing problems such as depression, nervousness, anger or sadness
also addictions such as smoking, alcohol or drugs.

Helps finding lost objects.

Draw cho ku rei to create a connection with the Reiki energy source then Sei He Ki is drawn over the area where the Reiki energies are required and finally the energies are sealed by drawing the power symbol Cho Ku Rei again. This sustains the effect of Sei He Ki for a longer time.

The sequence Cho Ku Rei + Sei He Ki + Hon Sha Ze Sho Nen is very efficient in opening the dimension towards the universal life force energy and this can help you channel the flow to more specific goals.

snippet.title: The most important responsibility of a man: To Conquer Your Mind (Check Pinned Comment💎👉)
snippet.description:
In this video, we're exploring the most important responsibility of a man: to conquer his mind.

 Applied faith, specialized knowledge, and the science of getting rich are all key to conquering your mind and achieving your goals. In this video, I'm sharing with you how to use these concepts to achieve success in your life.

Whatever the mind of man can conveive and believe - be it positive or negative thoughts - affirmative prayer is the key to transforming these thoughts into reality. By using the power of prayer, you can achieve anything you want in your life! So what are you waiting for? Start using the power of prayer today!
Napoleon Hill, the author of Think and Grow Rich, is one of the founders of motivational, self-help, and inspirational life coaching.

In this video, Napoleon Hill shares one of his most powerful insights: that adversity can fuel your mental strength and help you achieve your goals.

Hill was a pioneer in the field of personal development, and his teachings are still widely accepted today. In this video, we'll explore how adversity can help us grow and learn, and how to use it to our advantage. Watch and learn how to take your mental strength to the next level!

This TV Series will help you learn how to improve your life using 13 rules for success as presented by Napoleon Hill in 1954.  This is the tenth visit.

The principles that Napoleon Hill will share with you in these 13 lessons may change your life as it did mine. I encourage you to listen to several lessons at first, just to get a feel for Napoleon Hill's language and delivery. Then return to the beginning, prepared to take notes - starting, stopping and rewatching the program as needed. Be patient.
